Sandbox_PhunMart_Debug_tooltip: Adds more verbose logging for debugging purposes. Only use if you know what you're doing.
Sandbox_PhunMart_ChanceToDropChange: Chance for zombies to drop coins
Sandbox_PhunMart_ChanceToDropChange_tool: The probability that a zombie will drop coins upon death.
Sandbox_PhunMart_MinCoinsToDrop_tooltip: The minimum number of cents a zombie can drop upon death.
Sandbox_PhunMart_MaxCoinsToDrop_tooltip: The maximum number of cents a zombie can drop upon death.
Sandbox_PhunMart_WalletDropOnDeath_toolt: If enabled, players will drop their wallet upon death
Sandbox_PhunMart_WalletOnlyPickupOwn_too: If enabled, only the owner of a wallet can pick it up.
Sandbox_PhunMart_WalletReturnRate_toolti: The percentage of money that is returned to the player on death. 0 means no money is returned, 100 means all money is returned.
Sandbox_PhunMart_ChangeCapCents_tooltip: Maximum cents a player can carry (9999 = $99.99). At cap, coins left on the ground will not be consumed.
Sandbox_PhunMart_TokenCap_tooltip: Maximum number of special tokens a player can carry.
Sandbox_PhunMart_EnableChangePool_toolti: Show the change (coin) currency pool in the shop UI and wallet tab. Disabling hides it from players but does not delete balances.
Sandbox_PhunMart_EnableTokenPool_tooltip: Show the token currency pool in the shop UI and wallet tab. Disabling hides it from players but does not delete balances.
Sandbox_PhunMart_DefaultHoursToRestock_t: The default number of hours between restocking a shop. 0 would mean that (by default) the shops are only ever stocked once
Sandbox_PhunMart_DefaultNumOfHoursToReRo: The default number of hours between changing the shop to a different one. 0 means shops will default to never changing
Sandbox_PhunMart_DefaultNumOfItemsWhenRe: Default number of items to stock
This the number of items a shop will stock by default
Sandbox_PhunMart_ChanceToConvert_tooltip: The chance that a vanilla vending machine will get converted to a random PhunMart machine. Set to 0 to disable
Sandbox_PhunMart_DefaultDistance_tooltip: The minimum distance between similarly grouped machines
Sandbox_PhunMart_MaxStickyItems_tooltip: Maximum number of items allowed in a sticky pool before a warning is logged. Sticky pools always show all their items in a shop. Keep this low to avoid cluttered shops.
Sandbox_PhunMart_AHEnabled_tooltip: Enable the Auction House feature, allowing players to list and buy items from each other.
Sandbox_PhunMart_AHMaxListings_tooltip: Maximum number of active listings a single player can have at one time.
Sandbox_PhunMart_AHExpiryHours_tooltip: Number of in-game hours before an unsold listing expires and the item is returned to the seller's collection box.
Sandbox_PhunMart_AHFeePercent_tooltip: Percentage of the sale price deducted as a fee when an item sells. Set to 0 for no fee.
Sandbox_PhunMart_AHMinPrice_tooltip: Minimum price amount for a listing (in cents for change pool, count for tokens).
